case_title: LYUCYA BORUKHOVITCH VS. SUTTER GOUGH, L.P. et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-07-2012. PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-19-2012 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 610. MAR-09-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR DEVINE, JOSEPH MICHAEL
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SUTTER GOUGH, L.P.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: YOSHIMURA, FRANCES HISAKO SUBSTITUTED FOR GRAVES, JOHN AS ATTORNEY FOR SUTTER GOUGH, L.P.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR LYN CLAYTON BIERCE.
PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR FRANK ANTHONY KONECNY.

PLAINTIFF(S) REJECTED PROPOSED ARBITRATOR BENJAMIN CLYDE HUTCHINSON.
DEFENDANT(S) REJECTION OF PROPOSED ARBITRATOR FRANK ANTHONY KONECNY CANNOT BE PROCESSED - RECEIVED UNTIMELY
REMOVED FROM PRE-ARBITRATION SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-19-2012 - CASE DID NOT SETTLE.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT SUTTER GOUGH, L.P. JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 5.0 DAYS
ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION EXTENDED TO SEP-19-2012.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE MAY-17-2012.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BORUKHOVITCH, LYUCYA AS TO DEFENDANT SUTTER GOUGH, L.P. DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAR-09-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-05-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-23-2012

RE SEND PANEL OF ARBITRATORS. REJECTION DATE MAY-31-2012. TWO OF THE THREE (3) PANELISTS FROM THE MAY-07-2012 NOTICE OF RANDOM SELECTION OF ARBITRATORS WERE REJECTED. THE REMAINING ARBITRATOR HAS RECENTLY REQUESTED TO BE REMOVED AS AN ARBITRATOR RESULTING IN THE NEW NOTICE.
AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR
PURSUANT TO CRC 3.827 (A), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. CALIM OF PLAINTIFF IS DENIED. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT, AWARD FILED BY ARBITRATOR, DATED SEP-20-2012
